web5: Interactive memory game developed with React, featuring difficulty selection, dynamic categories, and real-time state management.
web5m1: Interactive web application developed with React that simulates a memory game based on Funko Pop-style cards. It includes user authentication, sound effects, and experience customization through difficulty and category selection.
web5m2: The user logs in and plays to find matching pairs of cards in the fewest number of moves possible. The game manages state in real time, plays sound effects, and allows difficulty adjustment, offering a dynamic and immersive experience.
web5m4: Implementation of the complete memory game logic
web5m6: State management in React (cards, turns, matches)
web5m7: Integration of sound effects to enhance the experience
web5m8: Dynamic selection of difficulty and categories
web5m11: Real-time game state management: Use of React to control cards, turns, and validations
web5m12: User authentication integration: Implementation of Firebase Auth for session management
web5m13: Synchronization of sounds with user actions: Event control to play audio without affecting performance
web5m15: Integration of authentication in frontend applications
web5m17: Consumption and management of backend services (Firebase)

overviewTxt001: Pensá en Verde is a fictional ecological campaign poster designed to encourage recycling through an attractive reward. It uses a fresh, friendly, and clear aesthetic aimed at engaging a young urban audience. The design focuses on motivating immediate action by connecting recycling with a sustainable cultural event.
overviewTxt002: Asfalto is a fictional magazine dedicated to urban skateboarding culture. The cover was designed to capture the raw energy of the streets through a dynamic composition. The visual approach aims to reflect the rebellious attitude of skateboarding, connecting with a young, alternative audience passionate about movement, freedom, and self-expression.
overviewTxt003: Harry Potter-themed wedding invitation cards, created especially for a couple who are fans of the magical world. The design combines elegance with subtle references to the universe of the saga, integrating vintage-style typography, illustrations inspired by Hogwarts, and a refined color palette with warm brown accents.
overviewTxt004: Logo design inspired by a classic vinyl record for a fictional music store called Garage94.The logo combines an underground aesthetic with a retro vibe, using black and fuchsia colors. Designed to stand out on merchandise, vinyl records, and signage, it strongly represents Garage94’s rebellious and authentic identity.
themeTxt003: Magical wedding inspired by Harry Potter
themeTxt004: Brand identity for an alternative music store
